steps.title: Recognize the present-tense context
steps.content: The entire passage uses present tense: the languages “have a clear difference,” “is an object-oriented language,” “is not,” and both “require” technical knowledge. This consistent present tense indicates a general statement about how languages work.

steps.title: Select the present-tense verb
steps.content: ”Struggle” matches this present-tense context by describing a timeless difficulty that people face with the languages. The other choices shift to past tense, which would contradict the general nature of the statement. That matches choice A — A is correct.
